name: SlProgressBar
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/progress-bar/progress-bar.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: value
props.description: The current progress as a percentage, 0 to 100.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: When true, percentage is ignored, the label is hidden, and the progress bar is drawn in an indeterminate state.

props.name: label
props.description: A custom label for assistive devices.
